title: git-dumper: A tool to dump a git repository from a website
summary_snippet: This tool downloads a full git repository from a web server, even if directory listing is disabled, by intelligently discovering and fetching git objects and references.

title: Claude Code Advanced Patterns: Subagents, MCP, and Scaling to Real Codebases
summary_snippet: A resource summary and webinar overview from Anthropic regarding advanced implementation patterns for Claude Code, focusing on subagents and the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

title: Pwning Claude Code in 8 Different Ways - GMO Flatt Security Research
summary_snippet: A technical breakdown of eight vulnerabilities in Claude Code's command execution permission model that allowed for arbitrary command execution.

title: Web AI Agent Skills
summary_snippet: A curated collection of modular instructions (skills) designed for AI agents to correctly implement and interact with modern, experimental browser Web AI APIs.

title: Lessons from Building Claude Code: How We Use Skills
summary_snippet: A detailed look at how Anthropic developers use 'Skills' to extend the capabilities of Claude Code, including a taxonomy of skill types and best practices for building them.

title: Awesome Claude Code Security
summary_snippet: A curated knowledge base of security resources, hardening tools, and threat research specifically for Anthropic's Claude Code and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystem.

title: AndroHunter
summary_snippet: A native Android security toolkit built with Jetpack Compose that allows researchers to perform static and dynamic analysis of apps directly on the device.

title: SearXNG
summary_snippet: SearXNG is a privacy-respecting metasearch engine that aggregates results from over 70 different search services and databases without tracking or profiling users.

title: Google Sign-in: NotebookLM AppSec Collection
summary_snippet: A sign-in page for a Google NotebookLM instance which reportedly contains a large collection of application security presentations and talks.
